name: AssetExclusion: Exclude IP By NetBIOS Name
notes: Blacklists an IP that has been associated with N different NetBIOS Names over a given period of time.
conditions_text: when the event matches Identity IP is not 0
when any of Identity IP are contained in any of Asset Reconciliation IPv4 Whitelist - IP, Asset Reconciliation IPv4 Blacklist - IP
when at least 3 events are seen with the same Identity IP and different Identity Net Bios Name in 2 hour(s)
thresholds: when at least 3 events are seen with the same Identity IP and different Identity Net Bios Name in 2 hour(s)
TD_list: APPLY AssetExclusion: Exclude IP By NetBIOS Name on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches Identity IP is not 0
AND NOT when any of Identity IP are contained in any of Asset Reconciliation IPv4 Whitelist - IP, Asset Reconciliation IPv4 Blacklist - IP
AND when at least 3 events are seen with the same Identity IP and different Identity Net Bios Name in 2 hour(s)
RED_list: Add the "identityIP" of the event or flow payload to the Reference Set "Asset Reconciliation IPv4 Blacklist"
